title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at ABB India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at ABB India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India International Enterprises in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India International Enterprises:
ABB India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
